# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this repository, please do not open a public issue.

Please report security issues privately to the repository maintainers.

Include:

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested mitigation if available

## Supported Versions

Security updates are provided for the latest version of the project.

## Security Tools

This repository uses automated security controls:

- GitHub Actions
- CodeQL Analysis
- Gitleaks Secret Scanning
- Semgrep Static Analysis
- Trivy Security Scanning
- Dependabot Updates
